author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Script Library
description: Creates a TypeScript web resource project with Rollup bundler (UMD output). Supports npm packages via ES module imports, bundled into a single .js file. Build with 'dotnet build' — the SDK runs npm install and rollup automatically. CHAIN: Step 1 — create this project. Step 2 — add it as a project reference from the solution project ('dotnet add reference'). Step 3 — run pp-webresource in the solution project to register the compiled JS as a web resource. Step 4 — reference from forms via pp-form-event-handler (libraryName=publisherprefix_libraryname.js, functionName=publisherprefix_libraryname.ClassName.methodName) or from ribbon buttons via pp-ribbon-button (LibraryLogicalName=publisherprefix_libraryname).

PublisherPrefix.description: Publisher prefix (e.g., talxis, udpp). Combined with LibraryName to form the web resource name and UMD namespace.

LibraryName.description: Library name without prefix (e.g., documentgen, coreappshome). Combined with PublisherPrefix to form the web resource name (prefix_name) and UMD namespace.
